text: Clip svg aim label text rendering. (every 500ms)

status.comment: Implemented viewport-based label culling in GraphView.vue. renderNodes now filters to a visibleLabelIds set; updateVisibleLabels() computes the logical viewport bounds (via mapStore.physicalToLogicalCoord of the two screen corners) and includes only nodes that are in-view AND large enough to show text (r*scale>20, matching the template guard). Recomputed on a 500ms interval (per the aim spec) plus on resize, so off-screen nodes no longer emit empty SVG label groups every frame. Positions stay live (renderNodes still recomputes per frame via trigger); only set membership is throttled. Typecheck clean; frontend unit tests green (1 pre-existing unrelated AimCreationModal failure).
